sections.paragraph:
Original: פּסח

Transliteration: pâsach

Phonetic: paw-sakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pass over, spring over
    1. (Qal) to pass over
    2. (Piel) to skip, pass over
  2. to limp
    1. (Qal) to limp
    2. (Niphal) to be lame
    3. (Piel) to limp

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1786,1787

Part(s) of speech: Verb
